name: Scale AI + Anduril + Palantir + Vannevar Labs
summary: The primes owning the operational AI substrate: Scale AI (Thunderforge prime, $500M ceiling), Anduril (Lattice C2/sensor mesh, ~$30.5B+), Palantir (Maven prime, $1.3B), Vannevar Labs (OSINT/Decrypt). None ship a publicly-auditable governance/proof-carrying surface.
killinchu_fit: The single biggest finding: none of the four primes ship a publicly-auditable governance / proof-carrying interpretability surface. Killinchu's signed receipts + Lambda gate + Lean total-order proof are the OVERLAY that makes any of these stacks defensible under DoW Responsible-AI policy.
hooks: Anduril Lattice: Killinchu as a sensor-fusion + governance overlay (not a Lattice C2 competitor)
Palantir Maven: interpretable, auditable decision receipts
Scale Thunderforge: Lambda governance on agentic decisions
